\"Putnam\",\n                \"Raleigh\",\n                \"Randolph\",\n                \"Ritchie\",\n                \"Roane\",\n                \"Summers\",\n                \"Taylor\",\n                \"Tucker\",\n                \"Tyler\",\n                \"Upshur\",\n                \"Wayne\",\n                \"Webster\",\n                \"Wetzel\",\n                \"Wirt\",\n                \"Wood\",\n                \"Wyoming\"\n            ]\n        }),\n    /**\n   * POST /auth/login (OAuth2 password form, application/x-www-form-urlencoded)\n   * Used by both admin (carrie_admin) and Champions after first-login.\n   */ signIn: async (username, password)=>{\n        const form = new URLSearchParams();\n        form.set(\"username\", username);\n        form.set(\"password\", password);\n        return request(\"/auth/login\", {\n            method: \"POST\",\n            headers: {\n                \"Content-Type\": \"application/x-www-form-urlencoded\"\n            },\n            body: form.toString()\n        }, [\n            200\n        ]);\n    },\n    /**\n   * POST /auth/first-login — exchange temp password for permanent password.\n   * Used after admin approval; user has temp password from the approval email.\n   */ firstLogin: async (data)=>{\n        return request(\"/auth/first-login\", {\n            method: \"POST\",\n            headers: {\n                \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\"\n            },\n            body: JSON.stringify(data)\n        }, [\n            200\n        ]);\n    },\n    /** GET /auth/me — current user info from token */ me: async ()=>{\n        const token = session.get();\n        if (!token) throw new ApiError(401, \"no session\");\n        return request(\"/auth/me\", {\n            headers: {\n                Authorization: `Bearer ${token}`\n            }\n        });\n    },\n    /** GET /auth/applications/pending — admin only */ pending: async ()=>{\n        const token = session.get();\n        if (!token) throw new ApiError(401, \"no session\");\n        return request(\"/auth/applications/pending\", {\n            headers: {\n                Authorization: `Bearer ${token}`\n            }\n        });\n    },\n    /** POST /auth/approve/{application_id} — admin only */ approve: async (applicationId)=>{\n        const token = session.get();\n        if (!token) throw new ApiError(401, \"no session\");\n        return request(`/auth/approve/${encodeURIComponent(applicationId)}`, {\n            method: \"POST\",\n            headers: {\n                Authorization: `Bearer ${token}`\n            }\n        });\n    },\n    /** POST /auth/deny/{application_id} — admin only, requires reason */ deny: async (applicationId, reason)=>{\n        const token = session.get();\n        if (!token) throw new ApiError(401, \"no session\");\n        return request(`/auth/deny/${encodeURIComponent(applicationId)}`, {\n            method: \"POST\",\n            headers: {\n                Authorization: `Bearer ${token}`,\n                \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\"\n            },\n            body: JSON.stringify({\n                reason\n            })\n        });\n    }\n};\n// ── Convenience named exports for auth pages ──────────────────────\n/** signIn(email, password) → stores session, returns LoginResponse */ async function signIn(email, password) {\n    const result = await api.signIn(email, password);\n    session.set(result.access_token, email);\n    return result;\n}\n/** forgotPassword — POST /auth/forgot-password */ async function forgotPassword(email) {\n    return request(\"/auth/forgot-password\", {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: {\n            \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\"\n        },\n        body: JSON.stringify({\n            email\n        })\n    }, [\n        200,\n        202\n    ]);\n}\n/** setupPassword — POST /auth/setup-password (first-login flow) */ async function setupPassword(data) {\n    return api.firstLogin(data);\n}\n/** adminKey — used by admin page for privileged operations */ const ADMIN_KEY = \"msallis_admin_key\";\nconst adminKey = {\n    get: ()=> true ? null : 0,\n    set: (k)=>sessionStorage.setItem(ADMIN_KEY, k),\n    clear: ()=>sessionStorage.removeItem(ADMIN_KEY)\n};\n//# sourceURL=[module]\n//# sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;charset=utf-8;base64,\n//# sourceURL=webpack-internal:///(ssr)/./lib/api.ts\n");
